CTT.Settings.ShowNPCs.Name: Show NPC timers
CTT.Settings.ShowNPCs.Hint: Show timers for NPC combatants as well as player-owned combatants.
CTT.Settings.ShowOnlyOwnedToPlayers.Name: Players see only owned tokens
CTT.Settings.ShowOnlyOwnedToPlayers.Hint: When enabled, non-GM users only see timers for actors they own.
